caption: A person holds a sports trading card featuring Mike Conley of the Utah Jazz, displayed against a background with a red logo and the text "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". The card, labeled "OBSIDIAN", shows Conley in a white uniform with the number 10. As the sequence progresses, the person's hand remains positioned to the right, holding the card. Inset video windows appear in the margins, showing a man wearing a black shirt sitting in a room with white walls and equipment. The scene remains largely static across the frames, with the focus staying on the high-detail sports card and the consistent branding of the "JASPYS" case break environment. The "MIKE CONLEY" nameplate is clearly visible at the bottom of the card.
